title: OpenTikZ item metadata
description: Schema for every <name>.meta.json sibling of an icon, template, or example. See docs/DESIGN_GUIDE.md.

id.description: Globally unique, stable identifier (kebab-case). Used by catalog.json and the website.

type.description: Which content layer this item belongs to.

venue.description: Optional: conference/venue widths this item is tuned for (e.g. CVPR, NeurIPS, ACL).

license.description: SPDX identifier. Graphic content is CC0-1.0.

requires.description: LaTeX packages / TikZ libraries the .tex needs in its preamble.

preview.description: Relative path to the generated .svg preview.

description.description: Optional one-line description of the item.

featured.description: Optional: feature this item on the site's Home showcase.

composed_of.description: Optional: ids of the library pieces this item is composed of.
